subject: CIR.NO. 027- Summer Camp 2026
body:
[image: logo1.jpg]
*       SRI SATHYA SAI VIDYA VIHAR*

          Scheme No. 54, A B Road, INDORE (MP) 452010

                    CBSE School No. : 50056,   CBSE Affiliation No.1030023
                  E-mail: sai@sathyasaiindore.com <sai@sathyasaiindore.com>
     Ph: 0731-2553023
*CIR.NO.SSSVV/2026-27/027**
 Date: 19th April 2026*


Dear Parents

Sai Ram!

Vacation is just around the corner, bringing with it bright days and endless
possibilities!

To channel your child?s vibrant energy and enthusiasm into something joyful
and meaningful during the holidays we are delighted to present once again,
bigger and more exciting than ever ?.!



*?FUN UNDER THE BLUE SKY-SUMMER CAMP and SUMMER EVENING CLASSES**.?*

The camp is thoughtfully woven with a delightful blend of co-curricular and
sports activities, offering children a wonderful opportunity to explore
hidden talents, learn new skills, and blossom with confidence?all in a
lively and nurturing atmosphere.

T*his year we are coming with two options:*

*1.  **Morning Camp*

*2.  **Summer Evening Classes*

*Kindly note that in case the child wants to opt for both times, FEES IS
INCLUSIVE for both the times that is morning and evening. Only
Transportation fees (OPTIONAL) will be charged twice.*

*Day /Dates and Time*

*Commences* *on*

*Tuesday,* *28th* *April,2026*

*Culminates* *on*

*Tuesday,* *19th* *May,* *2026*

*07:00 a.m. ? 09:30 a.m.*

*List o*f activities offered in the Morning Summer Camp:
We are offering an array of activities for our students to choose from.
*The students can opt for ONLY one activity from each Group as per the list
given below.*

Interested students must give two preferences from each Group, i.e. two
from Group I and two from Group II. In case the quorum in the first
activity opted by the child is full the student will be given the second
option automatically. As the seats are limited, activities will be allotted
on a first come first serve basis. *The Management reserves all rights to
take the final decision.*
List of activities offered in the Evening Summer Classes:


?       The students can opt for ONLY one activity from the list given below


*S.No*

*Activity*

1

Robotics

2

Pickle ball

3

Swimming

4

Basketball

5

Cricket (For both girls and boys)

6

Table Tennis

*Registration Process*

Parents can register using the Google Form link given below:

        https://forms.gle/53v7hRdTMH7nWUMJA

The attached Consent Form and the cheque drawn in favour of *Sri Sathya Sai
Vidya Vihar,Indore *must be submitted to the respective Class Teacher latest
by *Thursday, 23rd April, 2026*. This is an opportunity for the students to
work towards being part of the school team as the Coaches will be closely
observing their performance. The students have to bring their own material
and carry their own sports kit.

 NOTE:

1.    Participation in the Summer Camp is entirely OPTIONAL.

2.    In case the quorum of minimum of 10 entries is not complete in an
activity, it might be withdrawn and the child can switch over to another
activity.

3.    The Swimming Consent form must be mandatorily submitted in case
swimming has been chosen as an activity.

4.    Amount once deposited will not be refunded.

5.    I cards will be issued. Wearing I card is mandatory

6.    Convenient Bus routes designed according to registrations will be
shared

7.    Kindly note that Sundays will be off.

 For any query, kindly contact the Camp Coordinators:

?       Mr. Anshul Billore for Outdoor activities- *9630737363*

?       Mr. Akhilesh Goud for Indoor activities-    *9926544071*
So come, let us join hands to ?Beat the Heat? and create unforgettable
memories together at our much-awaited camp ? ?Fun Under the Blue Sky!

 Looking forward to your child?s enthusiastic participation in these
enriching sessions.


With Best Regards



Dr. Anju Chopra

Principal

Email ? principal@sathyasaiindore.com

Website ? www.sathyasaiindore.com
